productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Non Leather Black Belts
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a bottom, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This synthetic leather belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Length: Freesize Made of synthetic leather for durability and style Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand name embossed on the loop and tail CareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
